message:
style(frankenterm-core): cargo fmt follow-up to wa-1m7nk bench/test additions

Pure whitespace/line-reflow from running cargo fmt after the
observation-loop bench and LabRuntime tests landed in 9a9ce869.
Zero behavior change.

- benches/observation_loop.rs: single .map().collect() reflow
- benches/tcp_tls.rs: criterion import reorder
- src/distributed.rs: one stream.shutdown() reflow
- src/runtime.rs: three hunks inside mod tests (backpressure,
  relay_mpsc_to_spsc, heartbeat) all added in 9a9ce869
- src/runtime_compat.rs: one .finish_non_exhaustive() reflow
- src/vendored/mux_client.rs: five identical
  timeout(..., oneshot_recv(closed_rx)) reflows
- src/vendored/mux_pool.rs: two reflows in tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
